mapper.select: select count(1) from lkt_coupon as a

SELECT count(distinct a.id) FROM lkt_coupon AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_coupon_activity AS b ON a.hid = b.id LEFT JOIN lkt_coupon_sno AS c ON c.coupon_id = a.id and c.recycle=0 LEFT JOIN lkt_user AS d ON a.user_id = d.user_id

SELECT count(distinct a.user_id) FROM lkt_coupon AS a LEFT JOIN lkt_coupon_activity AS b ON a.hid = b.id LEFT JOIN lkt_coupon_sno AS c ON c.coupon_id = a.id and c.recycle=0 LEFT JOIN lkt_user AS d ON a.user_id = d.user_id
